name: Cryo Bladestorm
description: An elegant frozen combat style. Swift strikes infused with cryo energy that freeze enemies in place.

abilities.name: Frostblossom Slash
abilities.description: Swift ice-infused strike — 1.5x ATK damage, 40% chance to slow

abilities.name: Glacial Waltz
abilities.description: Spin attack dealing 2.2x physical damage to all, bonus from SPD

abilities.name: Permafrost
abilities.description: 60% chance to freeze enemy for 1 turn, DEF -20%

abilities.name: Cryoclasm
abilities.description: Massive ice explosion — 3.0x physical damage, scales with SPD, resets if enemy frozen

name: Spirit Incinerator
description: A pyromantic guide art. Harness ghost energy and flames to incinerate foes while draining their vitality.

abilities.name: Spirit Flame
abilities.description: Ghost-fire spear strike — 1.6x ATK, self-heal 15% damage

abilities.name: Paramita Papilio
abilities.description: Enter the butterfly state — Costs 30% current HP, ATK +60%, attacks become FIRE, 3 turns

abilities.name: Sanguine Rouge
abilities.description: Passive empowerment — Fire damage +33% and absorb fire damage as healing, lasts 5 turns

abilities.name: Spirit Soother
abilities.description: Ultimate ghost strike — 4.0x magic damage (scales with ATK), massive self-heal (boosted if HP < 50%)

name: Hydro Performer
description: A star-blessed dance. Graceful water magic that heals allies and supports the party with aquatic blessing.

abilities.name: Dance of Blessing
abilities.description: Graceful healing dance — restore 35-55 HP to one ally, buff healing by 30%

abilities.name: Water Wheel
abilities.description: Spinning water attack — 2.0x magic damage, heal all allies for 50% damage

abilities.name: Harmony Preservation
abilities.description: Party-wide blessing — ATK +20%, DEF +20%, regen 5 HP/turn for 4 turns

abilities.name: Hajra's Hymn
abilities.description: Ultimate star dance — restore 50% max HP to all allies, cleanse all debuffs, +1 SPD

name: Ancient Warden
description: An ancient warden's power. Protective stance with karmic resolution, reducing damage and punishing aggressors.

abilities.name: Lancing Strike
abilities.description: Polearm thrust — 1.4x ATK damage, ignore 20% of enemy DEF

abilities.name: Warden's Valor
abilities.description: Enter guardian stance — take 25% less damage, reflect 15% damage back, 3 turns

abilities.name: Karmic Barrier
abilities.description: Protect all allies — DEF +40%, next ally attacked takes 10% less damage for 2 turns

abilities.name: Mastery of Pain
abilities.description: Channel karmic energy — 3.5x magic damage, scales with DEF, applies guard mark

name: Summoner
description: A summoner's prowess. Command mighty eidolons from the spirit realm to decimate foes and protect allies.

abilities.name: Summon Bahamut
abilities.description: Call the dragon king — 2.4x magic damage to all enemies, fire element

abilities.name: Summon Syldra
abilities.description: Invoke the water serpent — restore 40-60 HP to all allies, cure one debuff

abilities.name: Eidolon Channel
abilities.description: Channel eidolon power — MAG +50%, summons gain +30% damage, 4 turns

abilities.name: Absolute Summon
abilities.description: Ultimate eidolon — 3.8x magic damage to all, summon phantom guardian for 2 turns

name: Valkyrie
description: A divine valkyrie's power. Strike with sacred judgment while protecting allies with celestial authority.

abilities.name: Valkyrie Strike
abilities.description: Holy sword slash — 1.6x ATK damage, ignore 15% enemy DEF

abilities.name: Judgment Seal
abilities.description: Judge the wicked — reduce enemy ATK by 30%, DEF by 20%, lasts 3 turns

abilities.name: Transcendent Power
abilities.description: Divine blessing — party ATK +25%, DEF +30%, holy aura for 4 turns

abilities.name: Divine Execution
abilities.description: Execute judgment — 3.6x magic damage, scales with DEF, stuns if enemy HP low

name: Divine Dragoon
description: A dragoon's legacy elevated by divine power. Soar through the heavens with lance strikes and dragon-channeled attacks.

abilities.name: Dragoon Lance
abilities.description: Soaring lance thrust — 1.8x ATK damage, +1 SPD for 2 turns

abilities.name: Dragon Jump
abilities.description: Leap skyward — 2.2x ATK damage, evasion +20% next turn

abilities.name: Divine Flight
abilities.description: Take to the skies — evasion +40%, SPD +30%, party SPD +2 for 3 turns

abilities.name: Heaven's Fall
abilities.description: Descend with divine fury — 4.0x ATK damage, scales with SPD, area strike

name: Grail Guardian
description: A god-blessed kingship. Wield divine authority and summon the power of gods to protect and annihilate.

abilities.name: Holy Strike
abilities.description: Divine sword strike — 1.7x ATK damage, holy element

abilities.name: Divine Shield
abilities.description: Summon god's protection — DEF +45%, reduce damage taken by 20%, 3 turns

abilities.name: Grail Blessing
abilities.description: Divine blessing of the grail — restore 50-70 HP to all allies, cleanse debuffs

abilities.name: Lionheart Ascendant
abilities.description: Ascend as king eternal — 4.2x ATK damage, scales with ATK+DEF, blessing all allies
